items.name_en: 🌸 ICARE Straw Bag
items.name_cn:
🌸 ICARE Straw Bag
. YSL's new ICARE straw collection is undoubtedly the most anticipated item for this spring and summer! The straw design💐 is unique, like a gift from nature, full of vitality. Its colors are like a spring palette🎨, rich and vivid, making you happy at first glance~ Back to the bag itself: an enlarged LOGO, fully handmade, the full hand-crochet texture is amazing! It also comes with a detachable eyeglass case, perfect for spring and summer trips🏖️
 Model: 772191.
 Dimensions: 37-55x43x5cm.
 Eyeglass case dimensions: 21.7x16.9x2cm

items.name_en: #June Box#
items.name_cn:
#June Box#
YSL's new JUNE quilted calfskin box bag. The small body has a nice amount of space. The bag features a front flap and a structured bucket shape. The craftsmanship is extremely complex, featuring a Y-letter swirl design and diamond quilting. Fashion is truly a cycle; this new small box bag has a bright vintage look!!
 Dimensions: 19 X 15 X 8 cm

#June Box# Silver Buckle
YSL New June Quilted Box Bag, small body with nice space. Features a front flap, structured bucket design, extremely complex handcrafting, Y letter swirl clasp, and diamond quilting. Fashion is a cycle, the new small box bag has a stunning retro look!!
Size: 19 X 15 X 8 cm

items.name_en: JAMIE 4.3 LARGE POCHON New Arrival
items.name_cn:
JAMIE 4.3 LARGE POCHON New Arrival
New fanny bag 🐑 Imported original cowhide, very soft
Drawstring design gives the bag a natural, premium ruffled look
Metal chain bag
Naturally exudes a relaxed, chic, lazy vibe
Unique fanny bag shape with attitude
Extra-large capacity, fits a laptop
Perfect for work and daily use 👍 Can be used as a tote
Size: 27/34/3cm
Model: 809824
